requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — AMANORM / CREE Requirement and Mali Environmental Conditions
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——AMANORM / CREE要求与马里环境条件
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——AMANORM / CREE要求與馬里環境條件

summary.en: AMANORM, Mali's national standards body, adopts IEC international standards as national standards. For EV conductive charging equipment, the applicable IEC safety baseline is IEC 61851-1 (general requirements for EV conductive charging systems, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions) and IEC 61851-23:2023 for DC EV charging stations. Any donor-funded, NGO, government, or commercial EV charging project referencing international standards in Mali will require IEC 61851 evidence as the product safety baseline. CREE (Commission de Régulation de l'Électricité et de l'Eau) regulates the electricity sector and sets technical conditions for grid-connected equipment. IP65 ingress protection is recommended for outdoor equipment in Mali's Sahelian climate (dust, sand, rain during wet season). IK10 mechanical impact protection is advisable for equipment in accessible public locations. Thermal performance at sustained ambient temperatures of 35–45 °C must be demonstrated; derating curves for peak temperatures up to 48 °C (recorded in southern Mali) should be provided.
summary.zh: 马里国家标准机构AMANORM采用IEC国际标准作为国家标准。电动汽车传导充电设备适用的IEC安全基线为IEC 61851-1（电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及急停措施）和直流电动汽车充电站适用的IEC 61851-23:2023。马里任何参考国际标准的援助资助、非政府组织、政府或商业电动汽车充电项目，均将要求IEC 61851证据作为产品安全基线。CREE（电力和水务监管委员会）管理电力行业并设定并网设备的技术条件。在马里萨赫勒气候（旱季多尘沙、雨季有降雨）下，建议室外设备满足IP65防护等级；建议公共可触及位置的设备满足IK10机械冲击防护；须证明在35至45°C持续环境温度下的热性能，并应提供峰值温度最高48°C（马里南部有记录）时的降额曲线。
summary.zht: 馬里國家標準機構AMANORM採用IEC國際標準作為國家標準。電動汽車傳導充電設備適用的IEC安全基線為IEC 61851-1（電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及急停措施）和直流電動汽車充電站適用的IEC 61851-23:2023。馬里任何參考國際標準的援助資助、非政府組織、政府或商業電動汽車充電項目，均將要求IEC 61851證據作為產品安全基線。CREE（電力和水務監管委員會）管理電力行業並設定併網設備的技術條件。在馬里薩赫勒氣候（旱季多塵沙、雨季有降雨）下，建議室外設備滿足IP65防護等級；建議公共可觸及位置的設備滿足IK10機械衝擊防護；須證明在35至45°C持續環境溫度下的熱性能，並應提供峰值溫度最高48°C（馬里南部有記錄）時的降額曲線。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP65 recommended for Mali outdoor equipment
AMANORM — Agence Malienne de Normalisation (IEC adoption framework)
CREE — Commission de Régulation de l'Électricité et de l'Eau (electricity regulator, technical conditions for grid-connected equipment)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is a useful design starting point but does not substitute for IEC 61851 accredited test reports expected by AMANORM-aligned projects, CREE, EDM-SA, or donor organisations procuring to international standards in Mali. China standard IP ratings are assessed under GB/T 4208, which is technically equivalent to IEC 60529; IP test certificates from ILAC-recognised laboratories are preferable for international project procurement.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据是有用的设计起点，但不能替代马里AMANORM对齐项目、CREE、EDM-SA或按照国际标准采购的捐助方机构所要求的IEC 61851认可测试报告。中国标准IP防护等级依据GB/T 4208评定，技术上与IEC 60529等效；国际项目采购优先选用ILAC认可实验室出具的IP测试证书。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據是有用的設計起點，但不能替代馬里AMANORM對齊項目、CREE、EDM-SA或按照國際標準採購的捐助方機構所要求的IEC 61851認可測試報告。中國標準IP防護等級依據GB/T 4208評定，技術上與IEC 60529等效；國際項目採購優先選用ILAC認可實驗室出具的IP測試證書。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)
GB/T 4208 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code, aligned with IEC 60529)

gap.en: Exporters targeting Mali EV charging projects should prepare: (1) IEC 61851-1 clause-level conformance matrix with accredited test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; (2) IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC charger products; (3) IP65 ingress-protection test certificate for outdoor equipment; (4) IK10 mechanical impact certificate for publicly accessible equipment; (5) thermal derating evidence showing performance at sustained 40–45 °C ambient with peak tolerance up to 48 °C; (6) protective device ratings, isolation monitoring, and earthing design consistent with IEC 61851-1; (7) surge and transient protection evidence beyond China domestic baselines; (8) French-language installation and safety instructions. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report without a clause-level IEC 61851 gap assessment is not sufficient for international project procurement in Mali.
gap.zh: 针对马里电动汽车充电项目的出口商应准备：(1) IEC 61851-1逐条符合性矩阵及ILAC认可实验室出具的认可测试报告；(2) 直流充电桩产品的IEC 61851-23证据；(3) 室外设备IP65防护等级测试证书；(4) 公共可触及设备的IK10机械冲击证书；(5) 显示在40至45°C持续环境温度下性能并可承受48°C峰值温度的热降额证据；(6) 符合IEC 61851-1的保护器件额定值、绝缘监测和接地设计；(7) 高于中国国内基线的浪涌和暂态保护证据；(8) 法语安装和安全说明。未完成IEC 61851逐条差距评估的单独GB/T 18487测试报告不足以满足马里国际项目采购要求。
gap.zht: 針對馬里電動汽車充電項目的出口商應準備：(1) IEC 61851-1逐條符合性矩陣及ILAC認可實驗室出具的認可測試報告；(2) 直流充電樁產品的IEC 61851-23證據；(3) 室外設備IP65防護等級測試證書；(4) 公共可觸及設備的IK10機械衝擊證書；(5) 顯示在40至45°C持續環境溫度下性能並可承受48°C峰值溫度的熱降額證據；(6) 符合IEC 61851-1的保護器件額定值、絕緣監測和接地設計；(7) 高於中國國內基線的浪涌和暫態保護證據；(8) 法語安裝和安全說明。未完成IEC 61851逐條差距評估的單獨GB/T 18487測試報告不足以滿足馬里國際項目採購要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for any IEC-referenced project or AMANORM-conformant procurement; CREE sets technical conditions for grid-connected equipment; IP65 and thermal derating are practical requirements given Mali's Sahelian environment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Mali without additional accredited testing and clause-level gap assessment

source.publisher: CREE — Commission de Régulation de l'Électricité et de l'Eau (Mali electricity and water regulator)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Mali-facing EVSE must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP65 ingress-protection and IK10 mechanical-impact certificates, and thermal derating documentation for Mali's Sahelian ambient conditions. French-language documentation is required throughout.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向马里的EVSE须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、IP65防护和IK10机械冲击证书，以及针对马里萨赫勒环境条件的热降额文件。全部文件须采用法语。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向馬里的EVSE須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、IP65防護和IK10機械衝擊證書，以及針對馬里薩赫勒環境條件的熱降額文件。全部文件須採用法語。
